module_1_interaction_schema.summary: Customer interaction answers and state were captured.

module_2_requirement_clarification.summary: Daily e-commerce report boundary facts are available.

module_3_rpa_boundary_check.summary: Requirement is conditionally suitable pending mapping, date, and validation confirmation.

module_5_exception_design.summary: Exception, manual review, and logging policies are available.

confirmed_facts.value: Automatically collect daily operating data from multiple e-commerce platforms and write a daily report into Tencent Docs.
Run at a fixed time every day.

inferred_recommendations.value: Use retry-and-skip handling for platform access failures and continue with other platforms when possible.
basis: Module 5 exception design includes login and source data failures.

missing_required_items.question: Are source platform fields mapped one-to-one to Tencent Docs report fields?
missing_required_items.why_it_matters: Field mapping affects data write accuracy.

missing_required_items.question: Are GMV, paid order count, and refund metrics defined consistently across platforms?
Should the report use natural day, previous day, or platform-specific settlement day?
missing_required_items.why_it_matters: Date definition affects data collection filters.

missing_required_items.question: Should the robot only verify successful write, or compare written values against source platform values?
missing_required_items.why_it_matters: Validation method affects acceptance and exception handling.

conflict_or_uncertainty.description: The requirement says platform metrics are generally unified, but exact metric definitions are not confirmed.
conflict_or_uncertainty.impact: Report values may be inconsistent across platforms.

decision_summary.headline: This requirement is suitable for RPA after field, metric, date, and validation details are confirmed.
reasoning_points: Inputs are platform reports with repeatable access patterns.
The output template is fixed in Tencent Docs.

unified_view_model.headline: Daily e-commerce report automation is conditionally suitable for RPA.
unified_view_model.recommendation: Confirm field mapping, metric definitions, date definition, and validation method before implementation.
unified_view_model.requirement_understanding: Collect daily operating data from fixed e-commerce platforms and write it into a fixed Tencent Docs report.

process_and_branch_cards.title: Collect platform data
process_and_branch_cards.summary: Access each configured platform and collect the required daily metrics.

process_and_branch_cards.title: Write report
process_and_branch_cards.summary: Write mapped values into the fixed Tencent Docs report.

exception_handling: Login verification may require manual handling.
Target write failure must be logged and escalated.

customer_view_model.headline: Daily e-commerce report automation is conditionally suitable for RPA.
customer_view_model.requirement_understanding: Collect daily operating data from fixed e-commerce platforms and write it into a fixed Tencent Docs report.
business_scope_excluded: Handle long-term account risk as an automation task

process_cards.title: Collect platform data
process_cards.summary: Access each configured platform and collect the required daily metrics.

process_cards.title: Write report
process_cards.summary: Write mapped values into the fixed Tencent Docs report.

risk_and_manual_intervention: Login verification may require manual handling.

confirmed_development_basis: Business goal, trigger, and operated systems are confirmed.
rpa_capability_boundary: RPA can execute repeatable collection and writing.
RPA cannot define business metric standards.

process_cards.title: Platform data collection
process_cards.summary: Collect metrics from configured platform-store scope.

process_cards.title: Tencent Docs writing
process_cards.summary: Write mapped metrics to the fixed report area.

field_and_data_mapping: Source metric to target report field mapping is required.
exception_handling: Login failure, source field missing, target write failure, and validation failure require handling.
